broker.title: Choose Broker, Prop Firm or Trading Platform
broker.searchPlaceholder: Start typing the broker, prop firm or trading platform
broker.noResultsHint: Use generic template or add trades manually

account.title: Create Trading Account
account.subtitle: Set up the new account your trades will belong to.

fileUpload.title: File upload
fileUpload.desc: Upload broker-provided file with your trading history

manual.title: Add manually
manual.desc: Add your trades one by one with our interface

upload.title: Upload file
upload.timeZoneHint: Please select the file time zone. If you want to see data in a different time zone please update it in your settings.
upload.dropHere: Drag and drop your CSV or TXT file here
upload.dropActive: Drop the file to parse it
upload.emptyFile: The file is empty or has no readable rows.
upload.parseError: The file could not be parsed. Make sure it's a valid CSV.
upload.missingColumns: Required columns not found: {cols}. Check your export settings.

steps.1: Export your trading history from your broker or platform as a CSV file.
steps.2: Make sure the export includes at least: symbol, side, quantity, entry price and entry time.
steps.3: Select the time zone the file was exported in, then drop the file here.
steps.4: Review the recognized columns and click Import — duplicates are skipped automatically.

mapping.title: Map columns
mapping.subtitle: We auto-detected the columns from your file. Review and adjust if needed, then import. If date and time are in one column, map it to "Entry/Exit date / time" and leave the time field empty.

mode.label: What's in this file?
mode.tradesHint: Each row is one finished trade (entry + exit).
mode.fillsHint: Each row is a single order/fill (e.g. Rithmic order history). We'll group fills into round-trip trades per symbol.

manual.title: Add manually
manual.timezoneNote: Times are entered in your local time zone
manual.symbolFirst: Enter a symbol to start adding executions.
